auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Files.com API key sent with the X-FilesAPI-Key header. Create or view API keys in the Files.com web interface: https://www.files.com/docs/sdk-and-apis/api-keys.

extraFields.label: Site subdomain
extraFields.description: Files.com site subdomain used to build https://SUBDOMAIN.files.com API URLs.

actions.name: create_folder
actions.description: Create a folder at a Files.com path.

path.description: The Files.com remote path, such as folder/file.txt.

mkdirParents.description: Whether to create missing parent folders.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Files.com folder.

path.description: The full remote path for the Files.com entry.

display_name.description: The display name of the Files.com entry.

type.description: The Files.com entry type, such as file or directory.

size.description: The entry size in bytes when returned by Files.com.

created_at.description: The entry creation timestamp returned by Files.com.

mtime.description: The entry modification timestamp returned by Files.com.

permissions.description: The permissions string returned by Files.com for the entry.

download_uri.description: A temporary download URL when Files.com includes one.

custom_metadata.description: The raw Files.com object returned by the API.

file.description: A Files.com file or folder entry.

actions.name: delete_file
actions.description: Delete a Files.com file or folder path.

path.description: The Files.com remote path, such as folder/file.txt.

inputSchema.description: Input for a Files.com path operation.

deleted.description: Whether the Files.com delete request completed successfully.

path.description: The Files.com path that was deleted.

raw.description: The raw Files.com object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_file
actions.description: Retrieve Files.com metadata for a single file or folder path.

path.description: The Files.com remote path, such as folder/file.txt.

inputSchema.description: Input for a Files.com path operation.

download_uri.description: A temporary download URL when Files.com includes one.

custom_metadata.description: The raw Files.com object returned by the API.

file.description: A Files.com file or folder entry.

actions.name: list_folder
actions.description: List files and folders under a Files.com folder path.

path.description: The Files.com folder path to list.

perPage.description: The number of entries to return per page.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing a Files.com folder.

display_name.description: The display name of the Files.com entry.

anyOf.description: The raw Files.com list array response.

actions.description: Update custom metadata for a Files.com file or folder path.

customMetadata.description: Custom metadata key-value pairs to store on the file or folder.
